texto: Besides, what's in a name? Actually, a lot. Whether taken from a parent or grandparent, some saint, or even the late great Elvis, your name insists another person's dream of what you should have been. The portrait of some ancestral ideal lingers through heirloom names. Gender specific names imply all sorts of expectations. More than just a signifier used to summon, instruct, address, accuse, sometimes praise us, our names define and thereby limit us. They put us in a cage.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brien Piechos que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Besides, what's in a name? Actually, a lot. Whether taken from a parent or grandparent, some sain…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, expectations, names, com foco em termino e names.
